name: Western Copper Corporation
description: Western Copper and Gold Corporation is a Canadian mining company focused on the development of the Casino Project, one of the largest copper-gold deposits in Canada located in the Yukon. The company is committed to responsible mining practices, environmental stewardship, and community engagement. With strategic backing from major industry partners like Rio Tinto and Mitsubishi Materials, Western Copper and Gold aims to supply critical minerals for a low-carbon future while creating long-term economic value through its large-scale, long-life mining operations. The company is headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia.
